name: red-green-prune
description: Test-first development without test bloat or speculative design.

interface.longDescription: Observe RED, implement the minimum GREEN, refactor proven problems, and prune only redundant tests introduced in the current task.
defaultPrompt: Use Red Green Prune to implement this behavior.
Fix this bug test-first without adding redundant tests.
Review this change for over-engineering and test bloat.
